name: cold-email-generator
description: Generates and refreshes cold email copy with spintax formatting for instantly.ai campaigns. Supports 4 proven email types (Personalisation-led, Case Study-led, Bullet Point, Condensed) and Sequence 1 + Sequence 2 follow-up generation. Pairs with client-brief-generator: pulls value props, case studies, credibility, sender info, and mailing address from client-brief.md. Parses user input first, asks only for what's missing, never ships placeholder brackets, and outputs each sequence as a separate markdown artifact for easy copy-paste into instantly.ai.
